image_concept: High-quality flat lay of a beginner disc golf set + bag + water bottle.
text:
The Perfect Beginner Disc Golf Setup 
(Under $75 total) 👇

1. The Discs ($25)
Don't buy high-speed drivers. Stick to a neutral 3-disc set (Putter, Midrange, Fairway). It builds better form.

image_concept: Action shot of someone wearing a small sling bag.
text:
2. The Sling Bag ($20)
You don't need a massive backpack yet. A lightweight 8-disc shoulder bag keeps you agile on the course.

image_concept: Close up of a telescopic disc retriever reaching into water.
text:
3. The Retriever ($25)
The best investment you'll make. This pays for itself the first time you drop a disc in the creek. Mandatory gear.

image_concept: Text heavy call to action slide with arrow pointing to profile.
text:
